## 개요

필수적인 패키지를 불러온다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(tmap)
library(RStoolbox)
# library(randomForest)
# library(kernlab)
# library(RSNNS)
# library(C50)
```
:::


예제 데이터를 불러온다.


::: {.cell}

:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
train <- readRDS(system.file("external/trainingPolygons_lsat.rds", package="RStoolbox"))
lsat_str <- lsat |> 
  stretch(minv = 0, maxv = 255, minq = 0.05, maxq = 0.95)

my_map <- tm_shape(lsat_str) + tm_rgb(r = 3, g =2, b =1) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)
my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


## 감독 분류

훈련 데이터를 불러온다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
my_map <- tm_shape(lsat_str) + 
  tm_rgb(r = 3, g =2, b =1) +
  tm_shape(train) + 
  tm_polygons(col = "class", 
              palette = c("yellow", "sandybrown", "darkgreen", "blue")) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)
my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


최대 우도(maximum likelihood) 분류 알고리즘을 적용하여 감독 분류를 실행한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_mlc <- superClass(
  lsat, 
  trainData = train, 
  responseCol = "class",
  model = "mlc", 
  tuneLength = 1, trainPartition = 0.7
  )

sc_mlc$modelFit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[[1]]
  TrainAccuracy TrainKappa method
1     0.9972595  0.9956892 custom

[[2]]
Cross-Validated (5 fold) Confusion Matrix 

(entries are average cell counts across resamples)
 
            Reference
Prediction   cleared fallen_dry forest water
  cleared      145.2        0.0    0.6   0.0
  fallen_dry     0.0       20.2    0.2   0.2
  forest         0.4        0.0  255.4   0.0
  water          0.0        0.0    0.0  88.6
                            
 Accuracy (average) : 0.9973
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_mlc$validation$performance
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Confusion Matrix and Statistics

            Reference
Prediction   cleared fallen_dry forest water
  cleared        206          0      1     0
  fallen_dry       0         23      0     0
  forest           0          0    377     0
  water            0          0      0   156

Overall Statistics
                                     
               Accuracy : 0.9987     
                 95% CI : (0.9927, 1)
    No Information Rate : 0.4954     
    P-Value [Acc > NIR] : < 2.2e-16  
                                     
                  Kappa : 0.9979     
                                     
 Mcnemar's Test P-Value : NA         

Statistics by Class:

                     Class: cleared Class: fallen_dry Class: forest
Sensitivity                  1.0000           1.00000        0.9974
Specificity                  0.9982           1.00000        1.0000
Pos Pred Value               0.9952           1.00000        1.0000
Neg Pred Value               1.0000           1.00000        0.9974
Prevalence                   0.2700           0.03014        0.4954
Detection Rate               0.2700           0.03014        0.4941
Detection Prevalence         0.2713           0.03014        0.4941
Balanced Accuracy            0.9991           1.00000        0.9987
                     Class: water
Sensitivity                1.0000
Specificity                1.0000
Pos Pred Value             1.0000
Neg Pred Value             1.0000
Prevalence                 0.2045
Detection Rate             0.2045
Detection Prevalence       0.2045
Balanced Accuracy          1.0000
```


:::
:::


결과를 지도를 제작한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
r <- as.factor(sc_mlc$map)
levels(r) <- data.frame(ID = 1:4, class_supervised = levels(train$class))

tm_shape(r) + tm_raster(
  palette = c("yellow", "sandybrown", "darkgreen", "blue"), 
  title = "Supervised: \n Maximum Likelihood") +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE) 
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


## 무감독 분류

*k*-평균 분류법을 적용한다. 우선 클래스의 개수를 3개로 한 무감독 분류를 실행한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
uc <- unsuperClass(lsat, nClasses = 3)
uc_r <- as.factor(uc$map)
tm_shape(uc_r) + 
  tm_raster(palette = "Set1", title = "Classes") +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE, 
            title = "K-Means Clustering: \n3 Classes")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


클래스 개수를 4개로 한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
uc <- unsuperClass(lsat, nClasses = 4)
uc_r <- as.factor(uc$map)
tm_shape(uc_r) + tm_raster(palette = "Set1", title = "Classes") +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE, title = "K-Means Clustering: \n4 Classes")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


클래스 개수를 5개로 한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
uc <- unsuperClass(lsat, nClasses = 5)
uc_r <- as.factor(uc$map)
tm_shape(uc_r) + tm_raster(palette = "Set1", title = "Classes") +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE, 
    title = "K-Means Clustering: \n5 Classes")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


## 혼합 분류

## 분광혼합분석

[`RStoolbox`](https://bleutner.github.io/RStoolbox/) 패키지의 `mesma()` 함수를 활용하면 spectral unmixing이 가능하다.

## 객체-기반 분류

## 인공지능-기반 분류

인공지능-기반 분류법은 모두 감독 분류이기 때문에 위의 최대 우도법과 마찬가지로 훈련 데이터가 필요하다.

### 결정 트리(decision tree)

결정 트리 알고리즘을 적용한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_dt <- superClass(
  lsat, 
  trainData = train, 
  responseCol = "class",
  model = "C5.0", 
  tuneLength = 1, 
  trainPartition = 0.7)

sc_dt$modelFit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[[1]]
  TrainAccuracy TrainKappa method
1       0.99775  0.9964523   C5.0

[[2]]
Cross-Validated (5 fold) Confusion Matrix 

(entries are average cell counts across resamples)
 
            Reference
Prediction   cleared fallen_dry forest water
  cleared      138.6        0.0    0.4   0.0
  fallen_dry     0.2       22.2    0.0   0.2
  forest         0.4        0.0  272.6   0.0
  water          0.0        0.0    0.0  98.8
                            
 Accuracy (average) : 0.9978
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_dt$validation$performance
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Confusion Matrix and Statistics

            Reference
```

분류 결과를 지도로 나타낸다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
r <- as.factor(sc_dt$map)
levels(r) <- data.frame(ID = 1:4, class_supervised = levels(train$class))

tm_shape(r) + tm_raster(
  palette = c("yellow", "sandybrown", "darkgreen", "blue"),
  title = "Classes") +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE, 
    title = "AI-based Classification: \nDecision Tree")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](4_3_image_classification_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=7200}
:::
:::


### 랜덤 포레스트(random forest)

랜덤 포레스트 알고리즘을 적용한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_rf <- superClass(
  lsat, 
  trainData = train, 
  responseCol = "class",
  model = "rf", 
  tuneLength = 1, 
  trainPartition = 0.7)

sc_rf$modelFit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

  TrainAccuracy TrainKappa method

[[2]]

  water          0.0        0.0    0.0  86.4
                            
 Accuracy (average) : 0.9988
```

### 스포트 벡터 머신(support vector machine)

스포트 벡터 머신 알고리즘을 적용한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_svm <- superClass(
  lsat, 
  trainData = train, 
  responseCol = "class",
  model = "svmRadial", 
  tuneLength = 1, 
  trainPartition = 0.7)

sc_svm$modelFit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

  water          0.0        0.0    0.0  91.6
                            
 Accuracy (average) : 0.9992
```

### 인공신경망(artificial neural network, ANN)

인공신경망 알고리즘을 적용한다.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sc_ann <- superClass(
  lsat, 
  trainData = train, 
  responseCol = "class",
  model = "nnet", 
  tuneLength = 3, 
  trainPartition = 0.7,
  verbose = FALSE,
  trace = FALSE)

sc_ann$modelFit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

  TrainAccuracy TrainKappa method

  water          0.0        0.0    0.0  91.2
                            
 Accuracy (average) : 0.9972
```

### 합성곱신경망(convolution neural network, CNN)
